audit_protocol.rule: Any official denial of SHA-256 sealed evidence is a mechanical admission of complicity.
audit_protocol.trigger: Discrepancy between digital balance (25.2M MDL) and paper statements.

evidence_targets.name_distortion: Maceret vs Macheret spelling to block inheritance and international rights
evidence_targets.asset_hiding: Non-recognition of the 25,210,256.15 MDL detected in FinComPay
evidence_targets.idnp_manipulation: Use of IDNP ending in ..555 instead of ..655 to create a 'digital double'

legal_qualification.international: Violation of Jus Cogens (Right to effective remedy) and ECHR Art. 3[cite: 1, 3]
legal_qualification.domestic: Art. 332 CP RM (Forgery in public acts), Art. 191 (Embezzlement)[cite: 3, 5]
